subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 15/17] exportfs: add netlink support for cache flush with /proc fallback

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the new implementation's dependency order and suggested reordering the cache flush operations to maintain consistency with existing code.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink support for cache flush operations in the exportfs module, providing a fallback to /proc/net/rpc/*/flush if the sunrpc genl family cannot be resolved on older kernels.
